introSection:
Boomerang is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Floraland Continent Park in Wenjiang, Chengdu, Sichuan, China.

It is a Boomerang installation from Vekoma. The roller coaster was relocated by Beijing Shibaolai Amusement Equipment.
fullText:
Boomerang is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Floraland Continent Park in Wenjiang, Chengdu, Sichuan, China.

It is a Boomerang installation from Vekoma. The roller coaster was relocated by Beijing Shibaolai Amusement Equipment.
